title: NEEPCO Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 25 Executive Trainee Posts
description: The North Eastern Electric Power Corporation Limited (NEEPCO) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 25 Executive Trainee posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, and Civil Engineering can apply for the NEEPCO Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have menti...
